message:
Preserve existing Claude settings when source doesn't exist

Previously, if source settings.local.json didn't exist but target
did, graft would overwrite target settings with just the task list
ID. Now reads existing target settings first.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1178,6 +1178,11 @@ def run(self, source: Path, target: Path, spinner: Spinner) -> None:
                 settings = json.loads(settings_dst.read_text())
             except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):
                 settings = {}
+        elif settings_dst.exists():
+            try:
+                settings = json.loads(settings_dst.read_text())
+            except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError):
+                settings = {}
 
         # Set task list ID if we have remote URL and branch
         task_list_id = self._build_task_list_id()
